mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('forest_knot_seq')
INSERT INTO forest_knot (id, user_id, action_item_id, tag, situation_summary, action_text, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{actionItemId}, #{tag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{situationSummary}, #{actionText}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM forest_knot WHERE action_item_id = #{actionItemId})

SELECT fk.id, fk.user_id, fk.action_item_id, fk.tag, fk.situation_summary, fk.action_text, fk.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forest_reaction fr WHERE fr.forest_knot_id = fk.id) AS reaction_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forest_scrap fs WHERE fs.forest_knot_id = fk.id) AS scrap_count FROM forest_knot fk WHERE fk.id = #{id}
